channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: African Nations Look to Dangote Refinery Amid Middle East Fuel Shortages
item.description: As the war between Israel, US, and Iran dey shake global oil supply, plenty African countries like South Africa, Ghana, and Kenya don start dey look Nigeria Dangote Refinery for petrol supply. Normall...

item.title: Kano Government Fulfils Support Promise to Uromi Attack Victims’ Families
item.description: One year after 16 hunters were killed in Uromi community, Edo State, the Kano State Government has finally redeemed its pledge to assist the victims and their families. The Commissioner for Informatio...

item.title: Iran strikes Kuwait oil refinery as Gulf energy sites hit amid regional clashes
item.description: Iran has launched drone attacks on Kuwait’s Mina Al‑Ahmadi oil refinery, causing a fire and forcing the partial shutdown of the facility. The refinery, which can process about 730,000 barrels of oil p...

item.title: Comic Relief 2026: Comedy sketches, celebrity performances, and £4m raised for charity
item.description: The BBC’s annual Comic Relief event returned on Friday evening with a three-hour live broadcast packed with laughter, celebrity performances, and heartfelt charity efforts. Highlights included a spoof...

item.title: China's Duty-Free Access Set to Boost Kenyan Exports
item.description: Things are looking up for Kenya’s economy! China’s recent decision to waive import duties on Kenyan goods, starting May 2026, is a proper game-changer. This move, covering loads of African countries, ...

item.title: Microsoft Reduces Copilot AI Integrations in Windows 11 to Improve User Experience
item.description: Microsoft announced a series of adjustments to Windows 11 aimed at improving performance and usability by scaling back its integration of Copilot, the company’s AI assistant. Executive Vice President ...

item.title: Pradyut Bordoloi Comments on Congress Leaders Joining BJP Ahead of Assam 2026 Polls
item.description: The upcoming 2026 Assembly elections in Assam have already sparked major political realignments, with senior Congress leader Pradyut Bordoloi acknowledging that several of his party’s members are shif...

item.title: Hollywood and martial arts icon Chuck Norris passes away at age 86
item.description: Chuck Norris, a celebrated martial artist and Hollywood action icon, has passed away at the age of 86, according to his family’s statement on Friday, March 20, 2026. Born Carlos Ray Norris in Oklahoma...

item.title: Inquiry finds failures in police handling of triple killer before Nottingham attacks
item.description: The former chief constable of Nottinghamshire Police, Kate Meynell, has acknowledged that Valdo Calocane, who killed three people and attempted to murder three others in Nottingham in June 2023, shoul...

item.title: Trump urges Australia to support US involvement in Iran conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump has expressed surprise at Australia's reported refusal to participate in military operations related to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Speaking to Sky News Australia before de...

item.title: Mercy Oketch Eyes Strong Debut at World Indoor Championships in Poland
item.description: Kenyan sprinter Mercy Oketch, aged 23, is proudly representing the country at the World Indoor Championships taking place in Kujawy Pormoze, Poland. This is her first time competing in the event, and ...

item.title: B.C. mother with valid U.S. work visa and 7-year-old daughter detained at Texas immigration facility
item.description: The article reports on concerns for Penticton, B.C., resident Tania Warner and her seven-year-old daughter, Ayla Lucas, who are being held in a U.S. immigration detention facility in Texas. Warner, 47...

item.title: Sandiganbayan allows Romualdez family to keep $5.19M escrowed funds
item.description: The Philippine government failed to secure a judicial lien on $5.19 million in escrowed funds linked to the family of the late ambassador Benjamin “Kokoy” Romualdez, who was a key political figure dur...

item.title: Government dismisses false social media posts about Ukrainians entering India
item.description: The Government of India has refuted social media rumours claiming that over 3,000 Ukrainians have secretly entered India’s North-East to train insurgent groups. In an official statement, the governmen...

item.title: PM Shehbaz rejects proposal to raise fuel prices on Eid eve, govt to absorb burden
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced on March 20, 2026, that the government will not increase fuel prices next week, despite rising global oil prices. In a televised address to the nation on the ev...

item.title: Coroner rules Ricky Hatton did not show clear intent to end his life
item.description: A coroner has concluded that former world boxing champion Ricky Hatton did not display a clear intention to take his own life. The 46‑year‑old was found unresponsive at his home in Hyde, Greater Manch...

item.title: Lawmakers Push for Better Inclusion and Accountability in Universities and Technical Institutes
item.description: Members of Parliament sitting in the National Assembly Public Investments Committee on Governance and Education have urged universities and technical training institutes to improve inclusivity, accoun...

item.title: Duterte family restricts access to ancestral home in Davao
item.description: The ancestral home of former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte in Davao City has been temporarily closed to public visitors. According to reports from GMA Super Radyo Davao, the closure was ordered...

item.title: Ebonyi Death Row Inmate Claims Wrongful Conviction Amid Conflicting Accounts of Student’s Death
item.description: For Ebonyi State, one man wey dey condemned to death by hanging, Elechi Ikechukwu, don come out dey claim say dem condemn am wrongly for the matter wey concern one student from Ebonyi State University...

item.title: Cape Breton Homes Suffered Significant Losses After Post-Tropical Storm Fiona, Survey Finds
item.description: A recent survey highlights the economic impact of post-tropical storm Fiona on Cape Breton's homes. On average, homes in the area experienced a financial loss of $4,000 as a result of the storm, which...
